name: Ma-la Cucumber Fans
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tips from the cucumbers. Cut them into 2-inch lengths.
2. Grasp cucumber lengthwise between chopsticks held in a V-shape on a cutting board. Cut crosswise at 1/8-inch intervals to form a fan (chopsticks prevent knife from cutting through).
3. Toss cucumbers with salt. Set aside for thirty minutes to soften.
4. Drain, rinse with cold water, then press gently between palms to remove excess water.
5. Heat wok or medium-size heavy skillet over moderate heat until hot enough to sizzle a bead of water slowly. Add oil, swirl to glaze bottom, then reduce heat to low.
6. When hot enough to sizzle ginger thread, add ginger, garlic, chili, and peppercorns. Toss until fragrant (about ten seconds), adding more chili if needed.
7. Add cucumber, toss to combine. Then add soy, vinegar, sugar, and sesame oil. Toss until sugar dissolves and liquid is hot.
8. Taste and adjust with a bit more sugar if flavor of chili isn't fully developed.
9. Scrape mixture into a shallow bowl and set aside to cool, stirring occasionally.
10. Before serving, remove most peppercorns.
